subject: fix(review): strengthen edge cases across conditions, validation, embed, and builder
body:
Code review sweep fixes:

- conditions.ts: Replace raw String() coercion with normalizeForComparison()
  that trims whitespace and handles null/undefined consistently. Prevents
  accidental type coercion between number/string field values.
- embedResize.ts: Debounce MutationObserver callback (100ms) to reduce
  excessive postMessage calls when many DOM mutations fire in quick succession.
  Clean up timer on disconnect.
- FieldPropertiesPanel.tsx: Add maxLength=255 to field label input to prevent
  layout-breaking long labels in the builder.
- FormRenderer.tsx: Improve hidden field URL param normalization — now replaces
  all non-alphanumeric chars (not just spaces) with underscores. Also caps
  hidden field values at 10k chars as a safeguard against malicious definitions.
- validation.ts: Show a clear "too long to validate" message when input exceeds
  1000 chars, instead of silently truncating and giving a misleading error.
- TODO.md: Track server-side CSV export as a scalability item.

Tags: review, conditions, validation, embed, builder, security
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
